emails.subject: Huber Summary
emails.body: Huber Summary I've updated the spreadsheet to show the payables totals for the existing and proposed deals as Jan 25, 2002 and July 25, 2002, respectively. I have also modified the payables calculation to consider only 2002 prices, as this is the applicable period for our exercise. T

emails.subject: RE: Huber Summary
emails.body: RE: Huber Summary Ty, pls check your model, I would believe you have a file reference error on the July 25, 55 day payables number when you include new deals). Pls update and re-issue to me first thing. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry; Whitt, Mark

emails.subject: Huber Summary
emails.body: Huber Summary This file uses the expected wellhead netback price to calculated payables. Ty
